organic-billions-of-dollars-leave-the-us.hook: Billions of dollars leave the US every year — and a huge chunk never arrives. Here's why.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator on phone, stat on screen — '$2.5B sent from the US to [corridor] last year.' Beat 2 (9-25s): Quick screen-record of a traditional app showing a $15–25 fee on a $200 send — 'That's up to 12% gone before family sees a cent.' Beat 3 (26-45s): Switch to Speed Wallet screen-record — enter amount, zero fee shown, Lightning confirmation in under 3 seconds. Beat 4 (46-60s): Creator back on camera — 'Your money should arrive whole. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Film talking-head on phone in portrait. Screen-record competitor app first (blur name if needed), then Speed Wallet. Use on-screen text for the fee stat. No music license needed — ambient or none. One take + basic caption edit.

organic-you-do-not-need-a-bank-account-t.hook: You do NOT need a bank account to send money home. Let me show you.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Bold myth-bust text on screen over creator reaction face — 'No bank account? No problem.' Beat 2 (7-22s): Creator walks through Speed Wallet onboarding: download → enter phone number → fund with cash via supported on-ramp. Beat 3 (23-45s): Screen-record of a live send — amount entered, recipient in [corridor], confirmed in under 5 seconds, zero fee. Beat 4 (46-60s): 'Tag someone who still pays fees to send money home.' CTA drives comments + shares.
payload.production_notes: Use high-save myth-bust format (see hook index 1). Text overlay on beat 1 is critical — pause on it 2 seconds. Film in one continuous session to feel authentic. Add subtitles for accessibility.

organic-pov-you-sent-200-home-and-your-f.hook: POV: You sent $200 home and your family actually received $200.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): POV framing text on black screen — builds curiosity gap. Beat 2 (6-20s): Split screen — left: traditional wire with fee deducted, amount received shown in red. Right: Speed Wallet send, full amount confirmed, shown in green. Beat 3 (21-45s): Creator talking-head — 'Bitcoin Lightning means the network fee is fractions of a cent. Speed passes 100% of that through.' Beat 4 (46-60s): Show recipient notification arriving. 'This is what zero-fee actually looks like.'
payload.production_notes: Split-screen achievable in CapCut free tier. Use real Speed Wallet transaction (test send of $1 is fine for visual). Instagram Reels favors polished captions — add 3-line hook caption. Target posting Tuesday or Wednesday 11am–1pm EST for remittance audience.

organic-i-tried-bitcoin-for-the-first-ti.hook: I tried Bitcoin for the first time and it took me 47 seconds. Here's what happened.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Creator holds up phone to camera — 'I'm not a crypto person. I downloaded this app and tried it.' Beat 2 (7-25s): Unboxing-style screen-record of Speed Wallet first open — clean UI, no seed phrases, no jargon. Creator narrates: 'No wallet address. No gas fees. Just a phone number.' Beat 3 (26-48s): Creator sends $5 to a friend — friend's phone buzzes on screen. 'Done. That's it.' Beat 4 (49-60s): 'If you've been scared of crypto, this is literally where to start. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Lean into genuine first-timer energy — no over-production. Film the actual app UI without cuts to maintain authenticity. Creator should NOT use crypto jargon. Recruit a non-crypto friend to be on camera for the receive moment if possible.

organic-the-us-holds-200-000-bitcoin-you.hook: The US holds 200,000 Bitcoin. Your bank holds your dollars. Which one lost 90% of its purchasing power since 1971?

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Hook delivered as bold text-on-screen with creator voice-over — provokes the curiosity gap. Beat 2 (8-25s): Quick animated or text-slide comparison: USD purchasing power 1971 vs 2024 vs Bitcoin's trajectory (simple chart, no financial advice framing — pure education). Beat 3 (26-48s): 'You don't need to buy a whole Bitcoin. Speed Wallet lets you hold and spend sats — the smallest unit — with no minimums.' Brief app screen-record. Beat 4 (49-60s): 'Follow for more things your bank doesn't want you to know.'
payload.production_notes: Use hook index 12 stat as the grabber. Add 'not financial advice' text overlay to stay compliant. Chart can be made in Canva free. Strong follow-bait ending boosts account growth alongside reach. Post Thursday or Friday when finance content peaks on TikTok.

paid-your-family-is-missing-25-every-tim.hook: Your family is missing $25 every time you send money home.
paid-your-family-is-missing-25-every-tim.estimate: $1.80–$2.60 (below $3.17 benchmark — high-intent segment, strong pain-point specificity reduces scroll-past rate)

payload.problem: Show a phone calculator: $200 sent, minus $23 fee, equals $177 received. Text overlay: 'Western Union. MoneyGram. Your bank. All charging you 10–12%.' Creator voice-over: 'That's hundreds of dollars a year stolen from your family.'
payload.solution: Cut to Speed Wallet screen-record: $200 entered, fee shown as $0.00, confirmed in 3 seconds. Creator: 'Speed uses Bitcoin Lightning — your family gets every cent, instantly, no matter where they are.'
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Send free. Link below.
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram) — Interest targeting: international money transfer, Western Union, MoneyGram, remittance, Filipino diaspora, Nigerian diaspora, Latin American diaspora. 25–44, US-based.

paid-i-bought-my-first-bitcoin-in-47-sec.hook: I bought my first Bitcoin in 47 seconds. No wallet. No seed phrase. No confusion.
paid-i-bought-my-first-bitcoin-in-47-sec.estimate: $2.50–$3.10 (near benchmark — broad crypto-curious pool with strong UGC-style creative typically outperforms category average by 15–20%)

payload.problem: Creator on camera: 'I wanted to try Bitcoin forever but every app looked like a NASA dashboard.' Quick 2-second montage of complicated crypto UI screens. 'Seed phrases, gas fees, wallet addresses — I gave up three times.'
payload.solution: Screen-record of Speed Wallet: open app → phone number only → fund → send sats to a friend. Creator voice-over: 'Speed strips it down to what matters. It's just money. Fast. Free. And it actually works the first time.'
payload.cta: Try Bitcoin for real. Download Speed Wallet free.
payload.audience: TikTok Ads — Interest targeting: personal finance, investing for beginners, fintech apps, Cashapp users, Venmo users. 18–34, US. Exclude existing Bitcoin/crypto buyers.

paid-waiting-3-days-to-cash-out-your-win.hook: Waiting 3 days to cash out your winnings? That's not a feature. That's a punishment.
paid-waiting-3-days-to-cash-out-your-win.estimate: $3.00–$4.20 (slightly above benchmark possible due to smaller iGaming segment; offset by very high LTV — test $500 budget first to validate CPI before scaling)

payload.problem: Text-on-screen over ticking clock animation: 'Most iGaming platforms hold your withdrawal for 24–72 hours. That's your money. Sitting there. Doing nothing.' Creator: 'I won. I wanted it now. I got a pending notification instead.'
payload.solution: Screen-record: iGaming platform withdrawal → select Bitcoin Lightning → Speed Wallet notification arrives in under 5 seconds. Creator: 'Speed connects directly to Lightning. Instant cashout. No bank hold. No waiting. Just your money, in your wallet, right now.'
payload.cta: Cash out instantly. Get Speed Wallet.
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram) + TikTok Ads — Interest targeting: online gambling, sports betting, DraftKings, FanDuel, crypto payments, Bitcoin. 21–45, US states where iGaming is legal (NJ, PA, MI, CO, NV, IL, IN).
